text.title: Sunset Customer Comms Template Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path spec artefact
example.description: Solo SaaS builders pivoting from a failed v1 to v2 who need a single auditable comms record instead of drafting bespoke announcements every time. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated spec matching the output contract.
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-honest-cause drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
